instruction: Discuss the impact of this vulnerability with appropriate terminology.
input: In Daybyday CRM, version 2.2.0 is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability that allows low privileged application users to store malicious scripts in the title field of new tasks. These scripts are executed in a victim’s browser when they open the “/tasks” page to view all the tasks.
output: The impact of the Stored XSS vulnerability in Daybyday CRM includes potential execution of arbitrary scripts in the context of a user's browser session. This can lead to data theft, session hijacking, or unauthorized actions on behalf of the user.
